name: @vexa/dashboard-e2e
description: The L4 bulletproof harness: a real chromium (Playwright) loads a static fixture that runs the bundled @vexa/dash-ws brick over its FakeWsTransport, injects golden ws.v1 frames, and proves the REAL DOM renders them. This is the instrument that replaces node-ws/curl false-greens — green-in-Playwright means green-for-the-human's-browser. Graduates to the real stack by swapping the fake transport for a WebSocket-backed one and injecting goldens via redis; the DOM assertions are unchanged.
